title: Admin Advertisement Management System for Monetisation

requirements.text: Extend the backend to support advertisement management: add an Advertisement data type with fields for id, title, imageUrl, linkUrl, placement (enum: #jobBoard, #jobDetail, #seekerDashboard, #posterDashboard, #landing), isActive (bool), createdAt, and expiresAt (optional). Implement admin-only CRUD functions: createAd, updateAd, deleteAd, toggleAdActive, and a public getAdsByPlacement query that returns active ads for a given placement.

quotes: create how administrator can be able to add advertisement pages on appropriate areas of the app for monetisation

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can call createAd with all required fields and receive a unique ad ID
Admin can update any field of an existing ad via updateAd
Admin can delete an ad by ID via deleteAd
Admin can toggle an ad active/inactive via toggleAdActive
getAdsByPlacement returns only currently active ads for the specified placement
Non-admin callers to createAd, updateAd, deleteAd, toggleAdActive receive an authorization error

requirements.text: Add TanStack Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for advertisement operations: useGetAdsByPlacement(placement), useCreateAd, useUpdateAd, useDeleteAd, and useToggleAdActive mutations.

quotes: create how administrator can be able to add advertisement pages on appropriate areas of the app for monetisation

acceptanceCriteria: useGetAdsByPlacement fetches ads for a given placement and caches correctly
Mutation hooks (useCreateAd, useUpdateAd, useDeleteAd, useToggleAdActive) invalidate relevant queries on success
Hooks follow existing patterns in useQueries.ts

requirements.text: Create a reusable AdBanner component at frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx that accepts a placement prop, fetches active ads for that placement via useGetAdsByPlacement, and renders a dismissible banner card with the ad image, title, and an external link. Show nothing if no active ads exist for the placement. Include a subtle 'Advertisement' label for transparency.

quotes: create how administrator can be able to add advertisement pages on appropriate areas of the app for monetisation

acceptanceCriteria: AdBanner renders nothing when no active ads are available for a placement
AdBanner displays ad image, title, and external link when ads are active
A visible 'Advertisement' label is shown on the banner
The banner is dismissible by the user within the session
Component accepts a placement prop matching the backend placement enum

requirements.text: Integrate the AdBanner component into appropriate areas of the app: place one instance in frontend/src/pages/JobBoard.tsx (above or between the job listing grid), one in frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx (below the job details section), one in frontend/src/components/LandingPage.tsx (below the hero section), one in frontend/src/pages/SeekerDashboard.tsx (at the top of the main content area), and one in frontend/src/pages/PosterDashboard.tsx (at the top of the main content area). Each instance must pass the corresponding placement value.

quotes: add advertisement pages on appropriate areas of the app

acceptanceCriteria: AdBanner appears in JobBoard with placement='jobBoard'
AdBanner appears in JobDetailPage with placement='jobDetail'
AdBanner appears in LandingPage with placement='landing'
AdBanner appears in SeekerDashboard with placement='seekerDashboard'
AdBanner appears in PosterDashboard with placement='posterDashboard'
Banners are non-intrusive and do not obstruct primary app content

requirements.text: Add an 'Advertisements' management tab to the existing AdminDashboard page (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx). This tab should display a table of all advertisements (title, placement, active status, expiry, link) with actions to toggle active/inactive and delete each ad. Include a 'Create New Ad' button that opens a modal/form where the admin can enter title, image URL, link URL, placement (dropdown), and optional expiry date. Show a success or error toast notification after each action.

quotes: administrator can be able to add advertisement pages

acceptanceCriteria: Advertisements tab is visible in AdminDashboard and only accessible to admins via AdminGuard
Table lists all ads with title, placement, active status, expiry, and link URL
Toggle active/inactive action updates the ad status immediately with toast feedback
Delete action removes the ad from the list with toast feedback
Create New Ad button opens a form/modal with fields: title, image URL, link URL, placement dropdown, optional expiry date
Submitting the create form creates a new ad and refreshes the ads list
Form validates required fields before submission

constraints: All advertisement CRUD operations must be restricted to admin users using the existing role-based access control in backend/main.mo
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
AdBanner must not break existing page layouts or obstruct primary job board content
nonGoals: Payment processing or billing for advertisers
Automated ad impression or click analytics
Third-party ad network integrations (e.g., Google Ads)
